rows.label: bf04220100_0010
rows.name:
Long time ago, Grandpa Senzo and
Dad Tatezo were working on her.

rows.label: bf04220100_0020
rows.name:
Grandpa and Dad and Tora all
wanted to become Drivers.

rows.label: bf04220100_0030
rows.name:
However... Not single one
of us have potential...

rows.label: bf04220100_0040
rows.name:
So all of us decided to make
an artificial Blade that...

rows.label: bf04220100_0050
rows.name:
could resonate with us even
without Driver aptitude.

rows.label: bf04220100_0060
rows.name:
You must run, Tora! Take this and go!
Someday, you finish what we started!
